name: nft-minting-dapp
description: NFT Minting & Gallery DApp — CN6035 Hybrid DApp Development Coursework

scripts.install:all: cd blockchain && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.deploy:local: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
